Project Description:
- Framework agreement: support services in Project Management (PS) across 3 lots
- Scope: PM delivery (initiation, planning, control, reporting), PMO support, project assistance for IT projects (infrastructure, software, digitalization, process automation, KI), incl. SAFe (phoenics.) and ITIL context
- CPV: 79421100; 79421000
- Term: 36 months + 1×12-month option (max. 48 months)
- Estimated total value (excl. VAT): 14,400,000 EUR
- No minimum purchase; call-offs via mini-competitions (SOW)
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 08/08/2024 13:00 +02:00
- Offer validity: 137 Tage; Binding period: 31/12/2024
- Contract start: 01/10/2024; RV end (max): 30/09/2028

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Lot 1 — Projektmanager:
  - Deliverables: PM initiation/planning/control/closure; controlling & reporting; requirements mgmt (incl. offers); stakeholder mgmt; resource/cost/claim/risk mgmt; reporting; project marketing; crisis/escalation; quality/change; handovers/acceptance; knowledge mgmt per PS standards
  - Key requirements per profile: 3 profiles; degree (CS/IS/BWL or comparable) or IT data-processing vocational training; DE C1, EN good; IPMA Level D or PRINCE2 Foundation/Agile Foundation; ≥5y PM; ≥3y IT projects; ≥5y project controlling & reporting; ≥3y statutory accident insurance expertise; ≥5y PM tools (MS Project, Visio, MS Office) + Atlassian Confluence/Jira; ≥3y scaled agile (SAFe)
  - Experience: ≥3y PMO lead at IT service provider; ≥3y overall PM in social insurance (prefer Berufsgenossenschaften); ≥5y ITIL env.; ≥5y standardized methods (IPMA/GPM/PRINCE2); ≥5y leading large heterogeneous teams; ≥5y presentation/moderation; ≥3y consulting competence
  - Volume: Menge 14,400 Arbeitsstunde; ~3 FTE; 1,600 h/FTE/a
  - SLAs/tools: Atlassian, MS tools; on-call if agreed in SOW: reaction ≤45 min; on-call pay 20% of rate
- Lot 2 — Projektmanager Senior:
  - Deliverables: as Lot 1 plus programme management; result responsibility; advanced advisory in complex IT projects
  - Key requirements per profile: 9 profiles; degree or IT data-processing vocational training; DE C1, EN good; IPMA ≥Level D or comparable; ≥8y PM; ≥8y overall IT project lead; ≥8y programme mgmt; ≥8y reporting/controlling; ≥3y statutory accident insurance expertise; ≥8y PM tools (MS Project, Visio, MS Office) + Atlassian; ≥8y scaled agile (SAFe)
  - Experience: ≥8y PM/programme lead; ≥3y overall PM in social insurance; ≥8y ITIL env.; ≥8y standardized methods (IPMA/GPM); ≥8y leading large heterogeneous teams; ≥8y presentation/moderation (incl. upper management); ≥5y consulting competence
  - Volume: Menge 57,600 Arbeitsstunde; ~9 FTE; 1,600 h/FTE/a
  - SLAs/tools: as Lot 1
- Lot 3 — Projektassistenz:
  - Deliverables: support PM controlling docs; verify reports; maintain plans; schedule & minutes; prepare meetings (content/visual); follow-up (OPL, risks); track plan updates; documentation; ITIL docs; own Jira space; admin (drive/permissions/info distribution/process/term tracking); team contact; document reviews
  - Key requirements per profile: 3 profiles; completed commercial vocational training (minimum); DE native or C1; ≥2y IT project assistance (ideally IPMA); ≥2y project-support tasks; ≥2y support in controlling & reporting; ≥2y PM tools (MS Project, Visio, MS Office); ≥2y Jira & Confluence
  - Experience: ≥2y in PMO at IT service provider; ≥2y in social insurance (prefer Berufsgenossenschaften); ≥2y ITIL env.; ≥2y preparing project sessions; ≥2y presentation/moderation; ≥2y collaboration in large heterogeneous teams
  - Volume: Menge 19,200 Arbeitsstunde; ~3 FTE; 1,600 h/FTE/a
- Cross-lot constraints:
  - Profiles: submit anonymised (Lot1: 3; Lot2: 9; Lot3: 3). At least 1 profile per lot must score ≥60 pts (else exclusion). Profiles may be reused across lots. No alternative bids
  - Pricing: hourly rates per lot (remote/on-site) fixed through RV; may increase ≤10% in mini-competitions; time & material; no min quantity; travel costs only if agreed; hotel caps: 90 EUR/night (120 EUR select cities; 150 EUR fairs)
  - Mini-competitions: offer window typically 1–2 weeks (≥14 days); award = 60% quality + 40% price; other profiles can be offered if meeting criteria
  - On-site share: 10–40% depending on project; rest remote
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Total RV ceiling (excl. VAT): 14,400,000 EUR; max equals estimate
- Lot values (excl. VAT): Lot 1: 2,016,000 EUR; Lot 2: 9,792,000 EUR; Lot 3: 1,920,000 EUR
- Staffing: Lot1 ~3; Lot2 ~9; Lot3 ~3; 1,600 h/FTE/a
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- Germany: primarily München and Hannover; remote
- NUTS: DE929 (Region Hannover)
- On-site share per project: 10–40%
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- IPMA Level D (or PRINCE2 Foundation/Agile Foundation equivalent; PRINCE2 Foundation accepted as comparable to IPMA D)
- SAFe (scaled agile)
- ITIL (service management)
- EVB-IT Dienstvertrag; VOL/B (works); AGG compliance
- GDPR Art. 28 (Auftragsverarbeitung) incl. TOM; internal policies: Teledienste-/PC-/Password guidelines
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Subcontractors require prior consent (exception: EU/EWR affiliates); NDA, data protection, audit, IP, secrecy flow-down mandatory
- Eignungsleihe permitted with commitment form; potential joint liability per §47 VgV; replacement of third party with §124 GWB grounds within ≤7 calendar days
- Bietergemeinschaft: designate lead; joint/several liability; no multiple participation in same lot
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic submission only (German); Textform §126b BGB
- Portal/deeplink: https://bieterzugang.deutsche-evergabe.de/evergabe.bieter/api/external/deeplink/subproject/5fa7ee4e-ae0d-496d-b762-5607522b6dde
- No electronic catalog; no variants; multiple offers allowed
- E-invoicing required; contracts countersigned via DocuSign post-award

Offer Submission Documents: Signed self-declaration: non-existence of exclusion grounds (§§123/124 GWB)
Anonymised profiles per lot (Lot1:3; Lot2:9; Lot3:3) incl. CV, refs, certs
Hourly rates per lot (remote/on-site) in e-Vergabe
Acceptance/signature of NDA and internal policies (to be uploaded per instructions)
List of Documents: Balances or extracts for the last 3 fiscal years
Insurance certificate or insurer confirmation (≥1,000,000 EUR per incident)
EEE (as alternative preliminary proof), if used
Declaration on Russia sanctions (Art. 5k) for participants >10% of contract
Proof of Berufsgenossenschaft registration (for foreign bidders)

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: No explicit minimum turnover stated; provide 2021–2023 totals and balances.
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Provide 2021–2023 turnover comparable to the service description per lot.

Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Self-declaration on exclusion grounds; sanctions (EU 833/2014 Art. 5k); LkSG commitment.
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name scope via Verpflichtungserklärung when relying on third-party capacity; replacement within ≤7 days if grounds; prior consent for subs.

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Lot 1 (Projektmanager): 3 profiles; degree (CS/IS/BWL) or IT vocational training; DE C1, EN good; cert: IPMA D or PRINCE2 Foundation/Agile; ≥5y PM; ≥3y IT PM; ≥5y controlling/reporting; ≥3y statutory accident insurance; ≥5y MS Project/Visio/Office; Atlassian Jira/Confluence; ≥3y SAFe; PMO lead (≥3y); ITIL (≥5y); standardized methods (≥5y); team leadership (≥5y); presentation/moderation (≥5y); consulting (≥3y)
- Lot 2 (PM Senior): 9 profiles; as above with thresholds ≥8y (PM, programme mgmt, tools, methods, ITIL, leadership, presentations) and consulting ≥5y; domain expertise ≥3y
- Lot 3 (Projektassistenz): 3 profiles; commercial vocational training; DE native/C1; ≥2y IT project assistance; ≥2y project-support tasks; ≥2y controlling & reporting; ≥2y MS Project/Visio/Office; ≥2y Jira & Confluence; PMO experience ≥2y; social insurance ≥2y; ITIL ≥2y; meeting prep ≥2y; presentation/moderation ≥2y; teamwork in large heterogeneous teams ≥2y
- Proofs: CVs + concrete project references; certificates; anonymised diplomas allowed.
- Scoring: each profile scored; ≥1 profile/lot must reach ≥60 pts (KO).
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Anticipated resources per year: Lot 1 ~3; Lot 2 ~9; Lot 3 ~3; each 1,600 h/year
- Availability windows, start, and on-site share (10–40%) set per mini-competition SOW
- Profiles may be offered across lots; replacement right ensured in mini-competitions.
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- Key-personnel: multiple references permitted; must evidence listed years/skills (PM, ITIL, SAFe, domain, tools) and environment (methods/tools/PMO, complexity: content, duration, budget)
- Provide project context and concretely delivered role outputs in CV/ref forms.

Award Criteria:
- Basis: most economically advantageous offer (MEAT)
- Weights: Price 40% ; Quality 60% (profile-based scoring)
- Profile scoring (examples):
  - Lot 1: Methodical (35 pts: ≥5y PM; IPMA D/PRINCE2; IT PM; controlling/reporting; statutory accident insurance; tools; SAFe); Experience (35 pts: PMO lead; social insurance; ITIL; methods; team leadership; presentations; consulting); Profile content (30 pts: focus, environment, complexity)
  - Lot 2: Methodical & Experience with ≥8y thresholds; Profile content as above (30 pts)
  - Lot 3: Methodical (35 pts) and Experience (35 pts, incl. +10 pts social insurance), Profile content (30 pts)
- Exclusion: if no profile per lot achieves ≥60 pts
- Mini-competitions: 60% quality + 40% price; rates may increase ≤10%; time & material; no mandatory bid submission by RV partners
- Price evaluation uses lot-specific quantities (e.g., Lot1 remote 14,400 h; Lot2 57,600 h; Lot3 19,200 h) and remote/on-site rate lines (on-site often optional).
